title: Minimal Project Capsule Bootstrap

actions.skip_warning: The scoped docs guide differs from the v0.42.0 baseline. Project Capsule Bootstrap guidance was not merged automatically; review it manually.
The usage playbook differs from the v0.42.0 baseline. The single-project capsule prompt was not merged automatically; review it manually.

manual_review: The bootstrap command works only after the user has enabled scoped docs and selected project-capsule for one project.
Existing different capsule files are preserved and reported as review-needed.
If a guarded documentation update is skipped, review the new bootstrap guidance manually.
non_goals: No workspace-map enablement, profile change, workspace docs split, Source/Task/Risk/Test migration, or real capsule creation during upgrade
No --all, --force, Repo Lite generation, repository, artifact, or archive movement
No runner, daemon, scheduler, automatic commit, tag, push, or PR
